titleStmt.title: SII 25.288: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 288. (A.R. No. 288 of 1908.) AḶAGĀDRIPUTTŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the central shrine in Svarṇapurīśvara temple.

This incomplete inscription commences with the praśasti, Pugaḻ-śūḻndapuṇari, etc., of the king. The date of the record is lost. The details of date viz., Tulā and Sunday are not sufficient for verification.

It records the sale of 7 mā of lands by the peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ of a brahmadēya village in Tirunaraiyūr-nāḍu to a person (whose name is not clear) belonging to a place included in Uṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam, who granted the same to provide for different food-offerings during the midday service. The grant thus made, probably to the deity of this place, was exempted from taxes (iṟai-iḻichchi) The peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ obtained 13 kāśu as the pricevalue for the sale of lands made. A number of signatories who attested the sale document are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta yiṟ poṉ ḷaṅku k kiramat vayirākarattu vāri munaikkon taḷavaraicar tantaḷa miriyavāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvalikāṭṭip porpparinaṭā vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉṟicai temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumai ṭanaṉ nila
tanṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyi naṭi Iraṇ tonnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvā p pacceṅkol ticaitoṟuñcella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākamum Eṅkaṇum tantu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tanimeruviṟ puliviḷai vān=ta lar tiṟai viṭutantakalañcorikaḷuṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅkiya te
taṉ ponnakarppuṟa Iṉnāṭṭi(ṟa)ṟ kulappiṟai pol niṟppiḻaiyeṉṟum colletir � villetir koṭāvikkalan ṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuventuṅka pattirai Aḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅka kiṭappa Eṟinamalaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta nekatikaḷum cuḻanṟuḷa
yumuṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenka pālattan peruṉ ceṉaiyai varum poruta porkkaḷattanci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇena puttakāṭaṟa maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriya poccai veñcu
koṟṟa vicaiyastambhamum ticai � ti muttincalāpamum muttamiḻp potiyalumatta veṅkaripaṭum vaiyyaccayyamum kaṉniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷi teṉṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭiya kaṭal malaināṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellāntaṉivicumpeṟa māveṟikka kuṟumalar kulaiya koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭum neṟitoṟum nilai
kaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟal koḷ vīrasi ruḷi poṅkoḷi Āramuntiruppuya lum pola viramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkaka pār toḻac civaniṭattumaiyeṉati ḷuṭa niruppa Avaḷuṭaṉ kaṅkai viṟṟiruntena maṅkaiyar tilakam Eḻicaivalla mātam Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻiyum Amarntini tiruppa vāḻi
yum Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum ko rājakecari panmarāna tirupuvana
kaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu ḻa vaḷa nāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu brahma ṅkalattup peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Ivvāṇṭai tulānāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai tiru maṇṭapatte kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu paṇippaṇiyā ttu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇ
ṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu koṭ nāṭṭil Arayaṉ piccaṉāṉa centiram tiruvatta cāmattukku vaitta tiruvamutukkum tayiramutukkum kaṟiyamutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum nāṅkaḷ vi Iṉnilam Eḻumāvukkum kīḻpāṟkellai śrīkṛṣṇan maṟuvāykku kavuciyaṉ vaṭikanta

ttaṉum tampiyām nilattukku ṟkellai kellai tiruna naṭuvupaṭṭa tiruna naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Innila kum Iṟai Iḻi kācu 10 3 Ikkācu patiṉ muṉṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiyey kaiccela Aṟakkoṇṭu caruppeti maṅkalattu peruṅkuṟiperumakkaḷom I tarattiṟkku maṭakkivanta niṭaṅ
vū tiyati kha�4 Araikkāṇi muntirikai varaiyum cantirātitta m mahāūril m Eccoṟum cantirātittavarai pom Ākavum Iṉnilam nir ceyvatākavum nilatiṟappil paṇitta brānmaṇaraiyum �ttiley veṇṭuvatu maṇṟināl maṉṟupāṭu pa Iṉnilam viṟku Arai
kkāṇi muntirikaikkīḻ Eṇmāvarai nā ttaval Iṟuttuk kuṭukka kaṭavomāka vu nilam kallile veṭṭavum sa ceyvittukkoḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Iḻicci vilaiyāvaṇañceytu ku Ivvūr tirupputtūr mahādevaṟkku Āḷavan runtu paṇittār pāratāyaṉ śrī kriṣṇat tiruviṇṇakara niṉṟār paṇiyā pāratāyaṉ Ārā
paṇiyālum māṭilaṉ comaṉ maticūtapaṭṭan paṇiyālum pāratāyaṉ Ārāvamutu nārāyaṇanār paṇiyālum māṭila yālum Ivvilaiyāvaṇa mascastaṉRead maddhyastaṉmātāṉa maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ caruppetimaṅkalattu brānmaṇan kaviṇiyaṉ kecuvaṉ tirumālinampi Eḻuttiṉālumbelow.Āḷavanta ppetimaṅ
ntāmotiraṉ I[ rājendra] coḻaṉāna coḷentira ciṅka branmamārāya neḻuttinālum Ivvūr brānmaṇan pāratāyaṉ cīrāmaṉ Ārāvamuti neḻutti naālum māṭalaṉ cūriyaṉ tivā brānmaṇan pāratarāyaṉ ciri nālum Ivvūr Āḻvāṉ koyil kāṇiyuṭaiya bhārattuvāja gotāruttu vikhanasa sūtran devadevecaṉ tirukkaṇṇamaramuṭaiyāneḻutti nā r brānmaṇan pāratāyaṉ nārāyaṇan Aḻakiya ma ḷaṉ neḻuttinālum Ivvūr civabrāhmaṇan māṭalaṉ tāmotiran ticainilaiyeḻuttinālumStops here.
Digital edition of SII 25.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
